messages.content: 翻译 self assignment of field
自我分配领域

One of the arguments is uncompatible with the corresponding format string specifier. As a result, this will generate a runtime exception when executed. For example, String.format("%d", "1") will generate an exception, since the String "1" is incompatible with the format specifier %d. 翻译成中文
其中一个参数与相应的格式字符串说明符不兼容。因此，在执行时会生成运行时异常。例如，String.format("%d", "1")会生成一个异常，因为字符串"1"与格式说明符%d不兼容。

A public static method returns a reference to an array that is part of the static state of the class. Any code that calls this method can freely modify the underlying array. One fix is to return a copy of the array.
翻译
一个公共静态方法返回一个数组的引用，该数组是类的静态状态的一部分。调用此方法的任何代码都可以自由修改基础数组。一个解决方法是返回数组的一个副本。

This method contains an unsynchronized lazy initialization of a static field. After the field is set, the object stored into that location is further accessed. The setting of the field is visible to other threads as soon as it is set. If the futher accesses in the method that set the field serve to initialize the object, then you have a very serious multithreading bug, unless something else prevents any other thread from accessing the stored object until it is fully initialized. 翻译
此方法包含了未同步的静态字段懒初始化。在该字段被设置后，存储到该位置的对象被进一步访问。字段的设置一旦被设置就对其他线程可见。如果设置字段的方法中进一步访问服务于初始化该对象，那么你就有一个非常严重的多线程错误，除非有其他措施防止其他线程访问已存储的对象，直到它完全初始化。

This instruction assigns a value to a local variable, but the value is not read or used in any subsequent instruction. Often, this indicates an error, because the value computed is never used.
Note that Sun's javac compiler often generates dead stores for final local variables. Because FindBugs is a bytecode-based tool, there is no easy way to eliminate these false positives. 翻译
该指令给局部变量赋值，但是该值在随后的任何指令中都未被读取或使用。通常，这表示存在错误，因为计算得到的值从未被使用。请注意，Sun公司的javac编译器经常为最终本地变量生成死代码。因为FindBugs是一个基于字节码的工具，所以没有简单的方法来消除这些错误警告。
A mutable static field could be changed by malicious code or by accident from another package. Unfortunately, the way the field is used doesn't allow any easy fix to this problem. 翻译
可变的静态字段可能会被恶意代码或其他包中的意外代码更改。不幸的是，该字段的使用方式并没有任何简单的解决方法可解决这个问题。

This code stores a reference to an externally mutable object into the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Storing a copy of the object is better approach in many situations. 翻译
此代码将对外可变对象的引用存储到对象的内部表示中。如果实例被不受信任的代码访问，并且对可变对象的不受检查的更改会危及安全或其他重要属性，则需要采取不同的做法。在许多情况下，存储对象的副本是更好的方法。

Returning a reference to a mutable object value stored in one of the object's fields exposes the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Returning a new copy of the object is better approach in many situations.
 翻译
如果返回一个存储在对象字段中可变对象值的引用，则会暴露对象的内部表示。如果实例被不受信任的代码访问，并且对可变对象的不受检查的更改会危及安全或其他重要属性，则需要采取不同的做法。在许多情况下，返回对象的新副本是更好的方法。

A Thread object is passed as a parameter to a method where a Runnable is expected. This is rather unusual, and may indicate a logic error or cause unexpected behavior.
 翻译
一个Thread对象被作为参数传递给一个期望传入Runnable对象的方法。这相当不寻常，并且可能表明存在逻辑错误或导致意外行为的原因。

A value is checked here to see whether it is null, but this value can't be null because it was previously dereferenced and if it were null a null pointer exception would have occurred at the earlier dereference. Essentially, this code and the previous dereference disagree as to whether this value is allowed to be null. Either the check is redundant or the previous dereference is erroneous. 翻译
  fanyi
这里检查一个值是否为null，但是这个值在之前已被取消引用，如果它为空，之前的取消引用将会导致空指针异常。基本上，这个代码和之前的取消引用对于这个值是否允许为空存在分歧。检查要么是多余的，要么之前的取消引用是错误的。

This code stores a reference to an externally mutable object into the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Storing a copy of the object is better approach in many situations. 翻译
此代码将对外可变对象的引用存储到对象的内部表示中。如果实例被不受信任的代码访问，并且对可变对象的不受检查的更改会危及安全或其他重要属性，则需要采取不同的做法。在许多情况下，存储对象的副本是更好的方法。

Returning a reference to a mutable object value stored in one of the object's fields exposes the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Returning a new copy of the object is better approach in many situations.
翻译
如果返回一个存储在对象字段中可变对象值的引用，则会暴露对象的内部表示。如果实例被不受信任的代码访问，并且对可变对象的不受检查的更改会危及安全或其他重要属性，则需要采取不同的做法。在许多情况下，返回对象的新副本是更好的方法。
This method synchronizes on an object referenced from a mutable field. This is unlikely to have useful semantics, since different threads may be synchronizing on different objects. 翻译
此方法在可变字段引用的对象上进行同步。这不太可能具有有用的语义，因为不同的线程可能会在不同的对象上进行同步。

This instance method writes to a static field. This is tricky to get correct if multiple instances are being manipulated, and generally bad practice.
翻译
这个实例方法写入一个静态字段。如果正在处理多个实例，这很难正确实现，并且通常是不良实践。

This code stores a reference to an externally mutable object into the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Storing a copy of the object is better approach in many situations.
 翻译
此代码将对外可变对象的引用存储到对象的内部表示中。如果实例被不受信任的代码访问，并且未经检查的可变对象更改将危及安全或其他重要属性，则需要采取其他措施。在许多情况下，存储对象的副本是更好的方法。

Returning a reference to a mutable object value stored in one of the object's fields exposes the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Returning a new copy of the object is better approach in many situations. 翻译
如果返回一个存储在对象字段中可变对象值的引用，则会暴露对象的内部表示。如果实例被不受信任的代码访问，并且对可变对象的不受检查的更改会危及安全或其他重要属性，则需要采取不同的做法。在许多情况下，返回对象的新副本是更好的方法。
